title: Response Commitment, Problem Details, Streaming, and Downloads · Narrowing Workshop
summary: A backend pairing room predicts runtime, request, middleware, dependency, response, and cleanup transitions before assembling the first single-owner response and bounded stream protocol for response commitment, problem details, streaming, and downloads. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of single-owner response and bounded stream protocol while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging,…
objectives: Choose status and fields before commitment, assign one response owner, return after terminal sends, and observe writableEnded, headersSent, finish, close, and error distinctly.
Map stable internal failures to RFC 9457 types, status, title, detail, instance, extensions, localization, and disclosure policy.
Control JSON nullability, undefined omission, BigInt, dates, non-finite numbers, property order, cycles, and serialization failure before commitment.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Response Commit Single Owner
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop team handles case 8038 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to choose one response shape and stop a producer at the stream backpressure boundary; retain a screen-reader-readable decision trace; then rotate a signing key while an old valid session remains within policy. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Choose status and fields before commitment, assign one response owner, return after terminal sends, and observe writableEnded, headersSent, finish, close, and error distinctly.
